content.en:
Boundless Sea, Ye Tian came back with the Lord of the Shaking Mountain.

The Legendary Realm Lords of the True Sacred Land naturally recognized the Lord of the Shaking Mountain, although the Lord of the Shaking Mountain was the servant of the white-bearded old man, he was also the only servant, and he was also the caretaker of the Rising Sun Mountain, and no one dared to disrespect him.

The Lord of the Shaking Mountain almost never goes out, but once he goes out, he represents the white-bearded old man.

The Lord of the Shaking Mountain is here, and the Legendary Realm Lords of the True Saintless Land know what it means.

"I've seen the Lord of the Mountain!"

"I've seen the Lord of the Mountain!"

"I've seen the Lord of the Mountain!"

The Dragon Gu Lords greeted each other politely.

"You're welcome!"

The Lord of the Mountains laughed.

At this time, Ye Tian said, "The white-bearded old man asked the Lord of the Shaking Mountain to follow us, and the Lord of the Dark Word can go to the Lord of the Ice River." "

"My doppelganger is gone. The Ice Lord said.

It didn't take long for the Ice Lord to come with the Peak Legendary Realm Lord, the Ice River Lord.

The Ice Lord came to the True Nothing Holy Land, and the Shake 1 Lord said respectfully, "I've seen the Ice River Lord. "

"Lord of the Mountain!"

The moment the Ice Lord saw the Lord of the Shaking Mountain, he probably knew what the situation was, he was not angry, it was also appropriate for the Holy Land to be so cautious.160 After all, the three thousand iris were indeed worthy of attention.

"Didn't the white-bearded old man come?"

The Ice Lord asked.

Lord Shaking Mountain said, "My master has traveled through the timeline, so he is not interested. "

"Hahaha, I really envy the old man with the white beard, I want to know the eternal master, I want this kind of opportunity, but the old man with the white beard doesn't care too much. The Ice Lord said with a smile.

"Where are the three thousand kites? "

Icelord Road.

"Glacier Lord, please come with us. "Lord Longgu took the Ice Lord to the Void River Boundary Array in the True Void Holy Land.

Soon, the Ice Lord saw three thousand kites.

"Sure enough, it's three thousand kites!"

The Ice Lord said slightly.

He didn't expect that the True Saintless Land would have such an opportunity to obtain such a treasure.

"Ice Lord, how do you urge the three thousand kites to cross the timeline?"

The Lord of the Word asked.

The Ice River Lord said: "First of all, I want to remind you, once you urge the three thousand kites, the movement will be very large, and at that time, the entire Infinite Sea will perceive the situation here, I can't hide the legendary realm lords from the outside world, and then the outside world will know that you really have three thousand kites in the Holy Land." "

"No problem, we know. "

Ye Tian and the Lord of the Dark Word nodded one after another, indicating that there was no problem.

Although in this way, the Unholy Land will become the target of everyone, such as the Lord of the Black Water, who must know that it was the True Unholy Land that stole his three thousand kites, and it will inevitably target the True Unholy Land, but compared to the harvest, it is still possible to take risks.

"That's good, I can urge the three thousand iris. In fact, to urge the three thousand iris, you must urge time and space at the same time, and only the peak legend realm lord can do it. "

Icelord Road.

"Ice Lord, press it. "

The Lord of the Word said.

At this time, all the Legendary Realm Lords of the True Saintless Holy Land came, and each of them dispatched a clone, and there were a total of fifteen Legendary Realm Lords, which was also the number of true Legendary Realm Lords of the True Saintless Land, and there was nothing to hide.

After all, for such an opportunity, there is no Legendary Realm Lord in the True Holy Land who would ignore it.

Coupled with the Lord of the Mountain Shake and the Lord of the Glacier, that is a total of seventeen Lords of the Legendary Realm.

"Okay, then I'll do it!"

The Ice Lord urged three thousand kites.

The power of time and space poured into the three thousand kites, and in an instant, the three thousand kites seemed to come to life.

Airplanes!!!

The power of time and space reshaped the body of the three thousand kites, and the bodies of the three thousand kites were reshaped at an incredible speed, and the aura on their bodies became more and more terrifying.

Soon.

The aura of the three thousand iris reached the level of the peak legendary realm lord, as if it had turned into a real iris

Bang!!!

The power of the kite has affected the outside world, and its body has torn apart the river of time and Kukai.

"Go up!"

The Glacier Lord reminded.

Whoa!!

One by one, the Legendary Realm Lords stood on the body of the Iris and landed on the scales one by one.

The kite entered the river of time and the long river of time, and half of his body was in the river of time, and half of his body was in the long river of time, constantly absorbing the power of the long river of time and the long river of time.

And the movement of the kite from reshaping his body to entering the Long River of Time and the Sky Sea was too great, and the entire Infinite Sea sensed the movement here.

Suddenly, one by one, the Legendary Realm Lords looked through time and space.

"What is this?"

Many Legendary Realm Lords didn't know Kite, so they were confused, but some Legendary Realm Lords recognized it

One of them is the Lord of Blackwater, because the three thousand iris are here for him.

"Iris, there is no holy place!"

The Lord of Blackwater was in the Blackwater Mountain, looking at the Long River of Time and the Sea of Kong, staring at the Iris Lin and the Rising Legendary Realm Lord of the True Saintless Land, his heart was full of resentment.

He still doesn't understand where the true unholy land has been invaded, and what innocent victims have been innocently harmed, it is all the real unholy land acting and directing itself.

"Damn it, there is no holy land, and you actually stole my three thousand iris !!"

The Black Water Lord was extremely angry, if it weren't for the huge power of the True No Holy Land, he would not be able to shake the True No Holy Land alone, otherwise he would definitely directly enter the True No Holy Land.

At the same time, he also saw the Ice Lord and the Mountain Shaking Lord, so naturally he couldn't take the lead at this time.

Otherwise, a peak Legendary Realm Lord like the Ice Lord could kill him at will.

"What are they going to do with the three thousand kites?"

The Blackwater Lord wondered.

If it weren't for this vision, he really didn't know that the three thousand iris were in the hands of the True Saintless Land.

Moreover, the three thousand iris seemed to be resurrected, and even he didn't know such a means.

The immeasurable sea.

Wuliang Mountain.

The Lord of Impermanence lives here, and he is the only peak Legendary Realm Lord of the Infinite Sea.

"Iris, there is really no holy land, it is really a force of good luck to obtain such a treasure!"

Lord Wuheng was also jealous.

He saw the Ice Lord, and he saw that the Kite had been activated, and he couldn't enter it anymore.

He also wanted to cross the timeline, but unfortunately, after this activation, the three thousand iris wanted to travel through the timeline again.

If he couldn't travel through the timeline, the three thousand kites would be of little value to him.

As the only peak Legendary Realm Lord of the Infinite Sea, the Lord of Wuheng was still quite annoyed.

Is it true that the Holy Land cooperates with the Ice Lord, and they don't cooperate with him, is this looking down on him?

"It seems that in the future, I will knock on the real holy land, the immeasurable sea, and the one who is in charge is my lord of Wuheng!"

Lord Wuheng said coldly. _
